query:
INSERT INTO emailSequences (
  userId, serviceId, sequenceType, name,
  emails, automationEnabled,
  createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  7110001, 1470001, 'welcome',
  'Life Coach Success Accelerator Welcome Sequence',
  '[{"day":1,"subject":"Welcome to the 5-Figure Coach Blueprint","body":"Thank you for downloading The 5-Figure Coach Blueprint. Over the next 7 days, I will share the exact Heart-Mind Activation Method that has helped 200+ coaches build consistent 5-figure months.","timing":"Immediately"},{"day":2,"subject":"The #1 Reason Life Coaches Struggle to Get Consistent Leads","body":"Most coaches make this critical mistake when trying to attract clients. Here is what to do instead using Phase 1 of the Heart-Mind Activation Method.","timing":"Day 2, 9am"},{"day":3,"subject":"Your Client Attraction Blueprint (Step by Step)","body":"Here is the exact 3-phase system you need to start getting consistent leads this week.","timing":"Day 3, 9am"},{"day":5,"subject":"Real Results: How Sarah Went From 2 Clients to Fully Booked","body":"Sarah was exactly where you are 90 days ago. Here is her story and how she used the Heart-Mind Activation Method to transform her practice.","timing":"Day 5, 9am"},{"day":7,"subject":"Your Next Step to Consistent 5-Figure Months","body":"You have seen the blueprint. Now it is time to implement. Here is how to get personalised support to accelerate your results.","timing":"Day 7, 9am"}]',
  false,
  NOW(), NOW()
);

INSERT INTO whatsappSequences (
  userId, serviceId, sequenceType, name,
  messages, automationEnabled,
  createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  7110001, 1470001, 'engagement',
  'Life Coach Success Accelerator WhatsApp Sequence',
  '[{"day":1,"message":"Hey! Thanks for grabbing The 5-Figure Coach Blueprint. Quick question — what is your biggest challenge right now when it comes to getting consistent leads? Reply with a number: 1) Not enough leads, 2) Leads do not convert, 3) Do not know where to start","timing":"Immediately","emojis":["👋","📋"]},{"day":2,"message":"Here is a quick win for you today: The Heart-Mind Activation Method starts with ONE thing most coaches skip. I will share it in our next message. Stay tuned!","timing":"Day 2, 10am","emojis":["💡","🎯"]},{"day":4,"message":"Quick check-in! Have you had a chance to look through the blueprint? The coaches who get results fastest are the ones who implement Phase 1 within the first 48 hours. Need help? Just reply YES and I will send you the fast-track guide.","timing":"Day 4, 11am","emojis":["✅","🚀"]}]',
  false,
  NOW(), NOW()
);
